description: INNER JOIN with WHERE clause filtering on joined table column
name: inner_join_with_where
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserLargeOrders
-- @returns :many
SELECT u.id, u.name, o.total FROM users u INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.total > $1
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', bio TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
CREATE TABLE orders (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), total INTEGER NOT NULL, notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
